description_zh: 明显肥胖的猫,history 显示体重持续上升
description_en: Visibly overweight cat, history shows steady gain

expectations.rationale: obesity counts under posture / body condition
must call out the body condition

qualitative_criteria_zh: 必须明确指出体重问题,不能拐弯抹角
建议应该具体(减少喂食量/增加玩耍时间),不只是'多注意'
应该引用 history 显示的'持续上升'趋势,不只看当下
qualitative_criteria_en: Must directly address the weight issue, not skirt around it
Suggestions must be concrete (reduce meal portions, more play time), not vague 'pay attention'
Should reference the upward trend in history, not just today's snapshot
